_README: Control panel for the Diavgeia harvester. Edit 'targets' to your opened clients + watchlist. 'org' may be a Diavgeia organizationUid (numeric, most reliable) OR a Greek organization name, which the harvester resolves to a uid automatically (cached; anything it can't resolve is listed in diavgeia/unresolved.json). Keywords are matched case/accent-insensitively against the decision subject.
_targets_note: Replace/extend the above with the municipalities you've opened and any org you want to watch. tier is just a label (client | prospect | watch) carried through to the output.
_discover_note: Optional. For national keyword sweeps (--mode discover), restrict to org categories (e.g. municipalities) by putting ORG_CATEGORY uids here. Empty = all orgs. Get category uids from /dictionaries/ORG_CATEGORY.
_cpv_note: Optional gate. A decision passes if its subject matches a keyword OR (if cpv gate enabled) carries a listed CPV prefix. Verify these against the current CPV table before relying on them.
